specific_question: What is the approval rating of provincial healthcare providers, similar to Mediconn Solutions in Canada in 2025, and how does this compare to 2024?
answer: A survey conducted by Ipsos, shows that the approval rating of provincial healthcare providers, like MediConn Solutions, has improved from 2024 to 2025. In 2024, only 40% of Canadians were satisfied with their healthcare, while in 2025, that number improved to 50%.
dr_question: The WTT Solution article from March 2025 indicates that Customer Relationship Management (CRM) software is trending in the healthcare industry. How can MediConn Solutions leverage this software to drive the growth of its healthcare services, using patient benefits from the software as a key to increased business by the year 2028?
